extends.description: Optional base config path resolved relative to this config file.

variant_name.description: Name used when this config is imported by another config through variant_configs.

variant_configs.description: Config files to expose as variants of this config. Paths are resolved relative to this config file.

constants.description: Reusable scalar values or JSON snippets. Numeric constants are also available to expression strings.

extends_variant.description: Optional variant name to use as the base before applying this variant's overrides.

set.description: Dotted config paths to override for this variant.

default_material_color.description: Fallback material color assigned to imported models that have no explicit, target, or source material.

cache.description: Reuse OpenSCAD exports and Blender render/projection artifacts when source and render inputs are unchanged.

cache_dir.description: Optional render-stage cache directory. Defaults to <output_dir>/.cache.

export_blend.description: Save the prepared Blender scene used for this render as a .blend sidecar next to the final still image.
